{{CargoClone
|name=Master Archer
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=138
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} ATK +30
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Resolver: Mutagen Serum +2.5%
|}}
